rule: candidate beats strongest non-oracle baseline on hidden success/return with positive paired support
candidate beats v2.4 reactive/no-planning references on at least three planning families
subgoal shams and planner-state ablations lose on the families they target
benefit is not explained by action spam, always-first-subgoal, or future-goal leakage
compact regression stays green before any promotion or baseline freeze
simple tabular/model-based baseline wins all hidden planning families
candidate wins only by seeing terminal/subgoal labels early
shuffled subgoal or no-planning ablations match the intact candidate
performance collapses into a degenerate always-act or always-first-subgoal policy
